posts.message:
🐥 The kids have been BUSY this week… 🐥
We welcomed 200 new baby chicks to the farm this past weekend!! 😍
Let’s just say…
There’s been a lot of excitement, a little chaos, and a whole lot of peeping going on 🐣😂
The kids are already hard at work helping care for them—making sure they’re warm, fed, and getting plenty of love ❤️
This is what it’s all about for us…
Raising food, raising kids, and raising them to know where it all comes from 🌱
Stay tuned as these little fluff balls grow! 🐔

🚨 CHICKEN SHARES ARE GOING FAST! 🚨
We only have 40 chickens left to claim for the year! 🐔
Don’t miss your chance to fill your freezer with farm-fresh, locally raised chicken straight from our farm to your table.
✔️ Raised with care
✔️ No shortcuts, just quality
✔️ Stock up for your family
Once they’re gone… they’re gone… until next year!
📩 Message us now to reserve your chicken share!
